lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਗੁਰਿ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਦੀਨਾ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: jin gur mo kau deenaa jeeo |
lines.english: The Guru who gave me my soul,
has Himself purchased me, and made me His slave. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿ ਕਲੇਸ ਭੈ ਭ੍ਰਮ ਦੁਖ ਲਾਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: kal kales bhai bhram dukh laathaa |
lines.english: My troubles, conflicts, fears, doubts and pains have been dispelled;
He Himself has blessed me with His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਕਰੀ ਨਮਸਕਾਰੁ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa tis gur kau karee namasakaar |7|
lines.english: Forever and ever, I humbly bow to the Guru. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਅਪਨਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: mil mere gobind apanaa naam dehu |
lines.english: Meet me, O my Lord of the Universe. Please bless me with Your Name.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
says Nanak, my Guru is All-powerful. ||8||9||
Without the Naam, one who dresses and eats well

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਅਸਨੇਹੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam binaa dhrig dhrig asanehu |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, cursed, cursed is love and intimacy. ||1||Pause||
is like a dog, who falls in and eats impure foods. ||1||
One who forgets the Naam and indulges in pleasures,
Without the Naam, all occupations are useless,
Like decorations on a dead body. ||2||
shall see all of his false pretenses fall away. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੁ ਸੁਪਨੈ ਨਹੀ ਤਨ ਮਹਿ ਰੋਗ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sukh supanai nahee tan meh rog |3|
lines.english: shall find no peace, even in dreams; his body shall become diseased. ||3||
One who renounces the Naam and engages in other occupations,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਨਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਨ ਲਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: naam sang man preet na laavai |
lines.english: One whose mind does not embrace love for the Naam

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਮਨਿ ਨ ਆਰਾਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam jin man na aaraadhaa |
lines.english: One whose mind does not contemplate the Name of the Lord
shall go to hell, even though he may perform millions of ceremonial rituals. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੋਰ ਕੀ ਨਿਆਈ ਜਮ ਪੁਰਿ ਬਾਧਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: chor kee niaaee jam pur baadhaa |6|
lines.english: is bound like a thief, in the City of Death. ||6||
Hundreds of thousands of ostentatious shows and great expanses
- without the Naam, all these displays are false. ||7||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੋਈ ਜਨੁ ਲੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam soee jan lee |
lines.english: That humble being repeats the Name of the Lord,
O Nanak, whom the Lord blesses with His Mercy. ||8||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੰਗਿ ਚਾਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: har kee preet sadaa sang chaalai |
lines.english: The Lord's Love goes with us forever.
Who shall stand by me in the beginning, in the middle and in the end. ||1||
My mind longs for that Friend,
The Perfect and Merciful Lord cherishes all. ||1||Pause||
Wherever I look, there I see Him pervading and permeating. ||2||
He shall never perish, and He shall never abandon me.
He is Beautiful, All-knowing, the most Clever, the Giver of life.
He is the Support of the breath of life; He is my Wealth.
God is my Brother, Son, Father and Mother. ||3||
He has made me His own, blessing me with His Glance of Grace. ||5||
Abiding within my heart, He inspires me to enshrine love for Him. ||4||
The Lord of the World has cut away the noose of Maya.
The Perfect Primal Lord is Ever-fresh and Ever-young.
Meditating on His Feet, all comforts are enjoyed. ||6||
Remembering, remembering Him in meditation, all diseases are healed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਪਦੁ ਚੀਨ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak har har pad cheen |
lines.english: Says Nanak, that devotee who realizes the state of the Lord, Har, Har,
The Lord is with me, inwardly and outwardly, as my Protector. ||7||
is blessed with the treasure of the Naam. ||8||11||
Raag Gauree Maajh, Fifth Mehl:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
They alone are Your devotees, who are blessed by Your Grace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਜਤ ਫਿਰੇ ਅਸੰਖ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: khojat fire asankh ant na paareea |
lines.english: Countless are those who wander around searching for You, but they do not find Your limits.
I am a sacrifice, I am a sacrifice to You. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਤਕੀ ਓਟ ਸੰਤਾਹ ਲੇਹੁ ਉਬਾਰੀਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mai takee ott santaah lehu ubaareea |2|
lines.english: I have sought the Protection of the Saints; please, save me! ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਪੰਥੁ ਡਰਾਉ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਭੈਹਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: sun sun panth ddaraau bahut bhaihaareea |
lines.english: Continually hearing of the terrifying path, I am so afraid.
